𝗧𝗘𝗡𝗡𝗜𝗦 | Displaying CSV data in a formatted, readable table within the terminal.  🔥 Super Hot!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Zig 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Displaying CSV data in a formatted, readable table within the terminal.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ auto-layout to fit your terminal window
✅ auto-themes to pick light or dark based on your terminal background
✅ auto-format numbers
✅ auto-detect csv vs tsv (or semis, or pipes)
✅ titles, row numbers, border styles


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 365 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 13 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Tennis is a command-line interface tool written in Zig that displays CSV data in a stylish, well-formatted table directly within the terminal. It automatically adjusts to terminal size, applies color themes based on background, and formats numbers for readability.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/gurgeous/tennis

𝗡𝗘𝗥𝗗-𝗙𝗢𝗡𝗧𝗦 | To provide developers with programming fonts enhanced with a comprehensive set of icons and glyphs, improving the visual representation of code and terminal output.  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 CSS 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide developers with programming fonts enhanced with a comprehensive set of icons and glyphs, improving the visual representation of code and terminal output.
📅 Created: Dec 2014 • Updated: Mar 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Patches developer-targeted fonts with a high number of glyphs (icons)
✅ Includes glyphs from Font Awesome, Devicons, Octicons, and others
✅ Provides a font patcher tool
✅ Offers multiple installation options for various operating systems (macOS, Windows, Linux)
✅ Includes over 3,600 icons and 50+ patched fonts


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 62.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 3.9K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 48 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Nerd Fonts is a project that enhances programming fonts by patching them with a large collection of glyphs and icons from popular iconic font libraries. It provides a font patcher tool for users to customize their own fonts, offering a wide variety of installation options across different operating systems.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To make GIMP's user interface and controls feel familiar to Adobe Photoshop users, easing the transition for those switching to GIMP.

✅ Custom Splash Screen
✅ Maximized canvas space
✅ Photoshop keyboard shortcuts

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 224 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 22 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PhotoGIMP is a patch for GIMP that modifies its user interface and keyboard shortcuts to closely resemble Adobe Photoshop. It aims to provide a familiar environment for users transitioning from Photoshop to the free and open-source GIMP, enhancing usability for those accustomed to Adobe's workflow.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗭𝗘𝗥𝗢𝗕𝗬𝗧𝗘 | Automating and managing encrypted backups for self-hosted data through a web interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

✅ Automated backups with encryption, compression, and retention policies powered by Restic
✅ Flexible scheduling for automated backup jobs with fine-grained retention policies
✅ End-to-end encryption
✅ Multi-protocol support (NFS, SMB, WebDAV, SFTP, local directories)

Zerobyte is a TypeScript-based backup automation tool designed for self-hosters. It leverages Restic to provide a web interface for scheduling, managing, and monitoring encrypted backups across various storage protocols.

𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗩𝗘𝗥-𝗦𝗨𝗥𝗩𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟 | Teaching cloud architecture and DevOps principles through an engaging game simulation.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✅ Interactive 3D simulation game
✅ Learn cloud architecture concepts
✅ Build and scale cloud infrastructure
✅ Handle increasing traffic loads
✅ Defend against DDoS attacks
✅ Manage budget and service health
✅ Upgradeable services (API Gateway, Compute, SQL DB, NoSQL DB, Cache)
✅ Multiple traffic types (Static, Read, Write, Upload, Search, Malicious)
✅ Service degradation under load
✅ Game over conditions (Reputation 0% or bankruptcy)

Server Survival is an educational 3D simulation game where players act as Cloud Architects. The game teaches cloud infrastructure concepts by challenging players to build, scale, and manage a resilient system to handle traffic loads, defend against attacks, and stay within budget.

THE Process Manager is a Rust-based TUI application for real-time system monitoring. It retrieves and displays detailed CPU and memory usage for running processes, offering sorting and filtering capabilities.
